entropy.note: target >0.8 for good exploration. <0.3 = policy is deterministic (bad).

kickstarting.note: should be non-trivial (0.1-1.0) early, decay to ~0 after 500 updates.

value_function.note: should decrease over time (or oscillate around a low value). With B1 distributional value, typical values are 2-5.
